title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same generate/chat/embed API surface as the Python lib.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat interface, model management, multi-user, dark/light themes).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API, streaming, and Android compatibility.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + Streamlit UI.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental VS-Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like assistant.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot bringing Ollama models to any server with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI that wraps Ollama REST calls with fuzzy-finding model selection and chat history.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & PVC support.

title: ollama-nvidia
summary: NVIDIA-maintained fork optimized for RTX & datacenter GPUs with CUDA 12 and TensorRT-LLM paths.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST endpoints that expose Ollama generate/chat/embed with built-in rate-limiting.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for on-demand local LLM queries.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client for Ollama with generate, chat, pull, list, copy, delete operations.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# SDK for .NET 6+; supports chat, generate, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration offering OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components for pipelines.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: End-to-end RAG chatbot template using Ollama, LangChain, FastAPI, and React frontend.

title: ollama-macos-swiftui
summary: Native macOS SwiftUI app that wraps Ollama REST API for a chat-like experience in the menu bar.
